demo.title: ophis-swap.sh
demo.code:
# Quote: how much WETH for 100 USDC on Base? (no execution)
# Args: chain_id sell_token sell_decimals amount buy_token buy_decimals
python3 scripts/ophis-quote.py \
  8453 0x833589fCD6eDb6E08f4c7C32D4f71b54bdA02913 6 100 \
  0x4200000000000000000000000000000000000006 18

# Execute: MEV-protected swap of 100 USDC -> WETH on Base via Ophis
# (approve + on-chain setPreSignature go through the Bankr Submit API;
#  the order settles gaslessly in a CoW batch auction)
python3 scripts/ophis-swap.py \
  8453 0x833589fCD6eDb6E08f4c7C32D4f71b54bdA02913 6 100 \
  0x4200000000000000000000000000000000000006 18 50

setup: Set BANKR_API_KEY (or configure ~/.bankr/config.json) — Ophis uses the Bankr Submit API to sign + broadcast the ERC-20 approval and the on-chain order authorization from the Bankr wallet.
Install Python 3 and the scripts from this ophis skill directory.
Run ophis-quote.py to preview the buy amount + fee before swapping.

Run ophis-swap.py — it approves the CoW VaultRelayer (if needed), authorizes the order via setPreSignature, posts it to the CoW/Ophis orderbook, and prints the order UID + explorer.cow.fi tracking link.
Same-chain swaps only. For cross-chain, use a bridging skill.
